name: Open Hip Twist
preceding_figure_names: Advanced Hip Twist, Aida, Chase, Closed Hip Twist, Cuban Break RF, Curl, Follow My Leader, Hockey Stick, Open Basic Movement, Open Hip Twist, Spiral, Split Cuban Break LF, Spot or Switch Turn To L (Lady to R), Three Cha Cha Chas Forward, Time Step RF, Turkish Towel
following_figure_names: Alemana, Hockey Stick, Hip Twist Spiral, Open Basic Movement, Time Step LF, Open Hip Twist, Curl, Cuban Break LF, Split Cuban Break LF, Chase, Turkish Towel, Sweetheart, Follow My Leader, New York LSP, Spot or Switch Turn To R, Underarm Turn To L, Three Cha Cha Chas Forward, Reverse Top
notes:
If a Spiral is done, finish with Runaway Chasse. (LF fwd, RF fwd, turn 1/2 to end LF back). See types of chasses in Cha Cha Technique.
If no Spiral: this can also finish in Open Position (with diagonal side chassse or back chassse), Contact Position (with side chassse), or CPP

comments: Slightly extend L arm fwd, close left thumb.
Brace L arm towards end of preceding beat, then L arm to side
Transfer weight to LF | 1/8 to L over 7-10

steps.action: Transfer weight to left foot, turn 1/8 to L
RF to side to chasse RLR, ending in Fan Position
comments: Ending in Fan Position. Body completes turn.
Receive weight, step RF back, but keep weight forward, not pulling Man back.
Hook RH finger on Man's hand. Extend R arm. Delayed Walk.
Response to Man's lead, Lady brings her weight well fwd at end of this step.
match arm tone to Man's. Allow R arm to bend.
Turn starts at tend of previous beat. Turn is initiated from hips. Hips turn more than upper body.

steps.action: RF fwd and slightly across, then turn to end RF back | 1/8 to L
comments: Turn is initiated from hips. Hips turn more than upper body.
Advanced Option: At end of "3", do a Spiral, ending LF wrapped loose in front of RF, facing away from Man.

steps.action: Back Lock LRL, end in Fan Position
comments: If a Spiral is done, finish with Runaway Chasse. (LF fwd, RF fwd, turn 1/2 to end LF back). See types of chasses in Cha Cha Technique.
If no Spiral: this can also finish in Open Position (with diagonal side chassse or back chassse), Contact Position (with side chassse), or CPP
